steps.title: Identify the sides
steps.content: Relative to angle $B$, the opposite side is $AC$ with length $24$, and the hypotenuse is $AB$ with length $40$.

steps.title: Apply the sine ratio
steps.content: Substitute the side lengths and simplify: $$ \sin B=\frac{24}{40}=\frac{3}{5} $$ The answer is A.
